languages.text: "Изимонд всегда был мне симпатичен своей строгостью и знанием дела. Однако ваши слова делают его без сомнений подозреваемым. Но нам нужна полная уверенность, чтобы не посеять во дворце смятение поспешными действиями. Продолжайте поиски".

traits.locale_text: "Изимонд всегда был мне симпатичен своей строгостью и знанием дела. Однако ваши слова делают его без сомнений подозреваемым. Но нам нужна полная уверенность, чтобы не посеять во дворце смятение поспешными действиями. Продолжайте поиски".

languages.text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."
languages.original_text: "Изимонд всегда был мне симпатичен своей строгостью и знанием дела. Однако ваши слова делают его без сомнений подозреваемым. Но нам нужна полная уверенность, чтобы не посеять во дворце смятение поспешными действиями. Продолжайте поиски".

traits.locale_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

"I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

"I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

languages.text: “我一向欣赏伊西蒙德的纪律性，以及他作为执法者的本事。但听你这么一说，他立刻就有了嫌疑。但我们必须百分百确定，否则贸然行事只会在宫中引起骚乱。继续你的调查吧。”
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: “我一向欣赏伊西蒙德的纪律性，以及他作为执法者的本事。但听你这么一说，他立刻就有了嫌疑。但我们必须百分百确定，否则贸然行事只会在宫中引起骚乱。继续你的调查吧。”

languages.text: « Si j'ai toujours apprécié Isimond pour son sens de la discipline et ses compétences en tant que prévôt, vos allégations font de lui un suspect idéal. Pour autant, nous devons d'abord nous assurer de sa culpabilité, sans quoi notre précipitation risquerait de provoquer des remous au sein du palais. Poursuivez votre enquête. »
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: « Si j'ai toujours apprécié Isimond pour son sens de la discipline et ses compétences en tant que prévôt, vos allégations font de lui un suspect idéal. Pour autant, nous devons d'abord nous assurer de sa culpabilité, sans quoi notre précipitation risquerait de provoquer des remous au sein du palais. Poursuivez votre enquête. »

languages.text: "Bir infazcı olarak disiplininden ve yeteneklerinden dolayı İsimond'u her zaman sevmişimdir. Ancak sözleriniz onu doğrudan şüpheli kılıyor. Fakat her şeyden kesin biçimde emin olmamız gerekiyor, aksi takdirde fevri kararlarımızla sarayın kargaşaya sürüklenmesine yol açabiliriz. Soruşturmaya devam edin."
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Bir infazcı olarak disiplininden ve yeteneklerinden dolayı İsimond'u her zaman sevmişimdir. Ancak sözleriniz onu doğrudan şüpheli kılıyor. Fakat her şeyden kesin biçimde emin olmamız gerekiyor, aksi takdirde fevri kararlarımızla sarayın kargaşaya sürüklenmesine yol açabiliriz. Soruşturmaya devam edin."

languages.text: «Siempre me han gustado la disciplina y las capacidades como guardia de Isimond. Sin embargo, sus palabras le convierten en sospechoso de inmediato. Debemos tener una certeza total, no obstante, para evitar sembrar el caos en el palacio con actos apresurados. Continúe con su investigación».
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: «Siempre me han gustado la disciplina y las capacidades como guardia de Isimond. Sin embargo, sus palabras le convierten en sospechoso de inmediato. Debemos tener una certeza total, no obstante, para evitar sembrar el caos en el palacio con actos apresurados. Continúe con su investigación».

languages.text: "Ich habe Isimond wegen seiner Disziplin und seinen Fähigkeiten als Enforcer immer gemocht. Allerdings machen Euch Eure Worte sofort zu einem Verdächtigen. Trotzdem müssen wir uns absolut sicher sein. Handeln wir übereilt, könnten im Palast Unruhen ausbrechen. Setzt Eure Untersuchung fort."
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Isimond wegen seiner Disziplin und seinen Fähigkeiten als Enforcer immer gemocht. Allerdings machen Euch Eure Worte sofort zu einem Verdächtigen. Trotzdem müssen wir uns absolut sicher sein. Handeln wir übereilt, könnten im Palast Unruhen ausbrechen. Setzt Eure Untersuchung fort."

languages.text: 「イシモンドは、彼の規律と、彼の執行官としてのスキルをいつも好んでいました。しかし、あなたの言葉は彼をすぐに疑わしい人物にします。しかし、私たちは完全な確信を持つ必要があります。そうでなければ、我々は、我々の行動が宮廷に混乱を引き起こすかもしれません。調査を続行してください。」
languages.original_text: "I have always liked Isimond for his discipline and his skills as an enforcer. However, your words immediately make him a suspect. But we must have complete certainty, or else we may cause turmoil in the palace by acting rashly. Continue your investigation."

traits.locale_text: 「イシモンドは、彼の規律と、彼の執行官としてのスキルをいつも好んでいました。しかし、あなたの言葉は彼をすぐに疑わしい人物にします。しかし、私たちは完全な確信を持つ必要があります。そうでなければ、我々は、我々の行動が宮廷に混乱を引き起こすかもしれません。調査を続行してください。」
